establishment.title: Foundation Establishment (2021)
points: In 2021, we started the August District Foundation with the idea of having full control and transparency over how the money we raise for various causes is used.
Instead of donating money to other charitable organizations, we decided to create our own foundation.
This ensured that funds and resources could be easily monitored and sent directly to the source of the problem.

challenges.title: Challenges Of Registration & Approval
points: Establishing a charitable foundation is extremely challenging due to very high standards and frequent application rejections.
Our application was rejected four times before finally being approved.
The entire process took around 1.5 years to complete.

charity.title: Official UK Charity Status (2023)
points: In July 2023, we were officially admitted to the UK directory of charities.
We were assigned the charity number: 1203851.
This milestone enabled us to carry out our first mission in April 2024.

mission.title: Our Mission & Future Goals
points: Our goal is to carry out one or two missions each year to support vulnerable communities around the world.
We have built a dedicated volunteer team to research and plan these missions effectively.
For transparency, we will physically attend and document each mission, publishing as much information as possible.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.content: We believe sustainability doesn't have to be perfect to make a difference. Real change happens when millions of people take small, imperfect steps toward more responsible choices.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.content: Sustainability should feel achievable, not overwhelming. Doing something imperfectly is better than doing nothing at all.
beliefs: Everyone can contribute in their own way

fashion.title: Fashion & Responsibility
fashion.content: Fashion consumption is at an all-time high, contributing significantly to pollution and waste. While producing nothing would be the only way to leave zero impact, this is unrealistic in an industry that supports millions of livelihoods worldwide.

reality.title: The Reality Of Sustainability
reality.content: Sustainability is a complex and evolving journey. Unfortunately, it's often misunderstood as restrictive, expensive, or all-or-nothing.
truths: Fast fashion creates massive waste and pollution
Cheap fabrics often come with hidden environmental and health impacts

beyond.title: Beyond Greenwashing
beyond.content: To us, sustainability is not a marketing trend. It's about creating meaningful change, not guilt-driven purchasing. Since day one:
points: Every production decision considers sustainability
Design and responsibility go hand in hand
Our name reflects our awareness of fashion's impact

rightWay.title: Doing Things The Right Way
rightWay.content: We choose ethical production over shortcuts, even if it takes more time.

transparency.title: Transparency & Progress
transparency.content: Fashion is one of the most polluting industries, and we know there's still more work to be done. We're committed to being transparent about where we are and where we're improving.
goal: Inspiring more conscious choices, no matter how small

sustainability.footer: Every step counts. Join us in making more conscious choices.

hero.title: Exceptional Healthcare
hero.subtitle: With a Kind Heart
hero.description: A comprehensive medical clinic providing the latest health services with professionalism and high quality.

clinicCard.title: Medical Clinic Brighton
clinicCard.description: Looking to make a switch to a new medical health clinic in Brighton? Just moved to the area and on the hunt for a reliable GP service? Whatever it is you’re looking for, Newbay Medical Clinic is ready to be the care service hub you can call up when you find yourself faced with an unexpected illness, condition, or concern. With experienced staff and a practice built on important values, you’ll notice the Newbay difference.

auth.loginSubtitle: Please log in to access your account
auth.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters

about.title: About Our Brighton-Based Practice
about.description: We know visiting the doctor can feel a bit daunting. At Newbay Medical Clinic, we’ve shaped our practice to make every visit feel safe, calm, and comfortable. We keep our space clean and welcoming, and we’re mindful of your time—so you can focus on feeling cared for, not stressed.

team.title: Experienced Team
team.desc: Everyone on the Newbay Medical team is experienced, and knows how to provide high-quality medical care. Our staff are compassionate, professional, friendly, and love to provide the highest quality of medical services you can find.

patient.title: Patient Centred Approach
patient.desc: At Newbay Medical Clinic, we’re all about you. Our patient-centred care means we listen, respect your choices, and focus on what matters most to you. We’re here to support you every step of the way, making sure you feel comfortable and confident in your healthcare decisions.

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.desc: At our establishment, we strive to maintain a timely schedule for our services. While our goal is to provide efficient and streamlined processes for booking and attending appointments, occasional variations in timing may occur, ensuring a balance between prompt service and flexibility.

aboutDetails.title: Our Vision: Shaping the Future of Exceptional Healthcare
aboutDetails.longDesc: At Newbay Medical Clinic, we believe that medicine is more than just science and procedures—it is a noble human mission that goes beyond traditional diagnosis and treatment. Our medical institution was founded on the principle of 'Holistic Care,' where we blend global medical expertise with the latest digital technologies to create a unique patient experience. We do not merely treat symptoms; we understand the individual as a whole. We are committed to providing an environment defined by transparency and innovation, where the doctor-patient relationship is built on absolute trust and mutual appreciation, ensuring every visitor leaves our clinic feeling fully confident in their health journey. We believe that continuous development is the only way to deliver the best of modern science in service of your health.

tech.title: Our Commitment to Technology and Innovation
tech.text: Newbay Medical Clinic is built upon an advanced digital infrastructure. We utilize the most secure Electronic Medical Records (EMR) systems, allowing us to track your health history with utmost precision. Through our innovative digital platform, you can book appointments, view test results, and communicate directly with your doctors anytime, anywhere. Integrating technology into the heart of our practice means minimizing human error, accelerating medical decision-making, and saving your precious time, so we can focus on what we do best: caring for you.

team.title: A Team of Experts at Your Service
team.text: Our team at Newbay is more than just medical staff; it is a constellation of consultants and specialists carefully selected not only for their deep academic expertise but for their genuine passion for medicine. We are committed to continuous investment in training our team on the latest global medical practices and the interpersonal skills required for patient care. At Newbay, we believe a successful doctor is one who combines diagnostic precision with compassion and kindness—a principle embraced by every member of our medical family to ensure you receive an unparalleled care experience.

process.title: The Care Journey: How We Look After You
process.step1: Consultative Reception: Upon your arrival, you are welcomed into an environment designed for your psychological comfort, where our team begins by meticulously documenting your health history to ensure a comprehensive understanding of your individual needs.
process.step2: Advanced Diagnostics: We rely on the latest medical and laboratory technologies available globally to provide you with an accurate and rapid diagnosis based on documented scientific data and facts.
process.step3: Personalized Care Plan: We do not rely on 'one-size-fits-all' solutions. Instead, we design a customized treatment plan based on your specific health status and personal goals, with periodic follow-ups to ensure the best sustainable outcomes.

commitment.title: Our Pledge and Ethical Charter
commitment.text: Our commitment at Newbay Medical Clinic extends far beyond clinical services. We are dedicated to adopting the highest global quality standards in every detail of our work. We promise to remain at the forefront of medical institutions that not only provide treatment but also uphold patient dignity, protect privacy, and stay abreast of the latest advancements in medical science to ensure a healthier future for you and your families. We never stop learning, and we are never satisfied with past successes, because our ambition is to be the gold standard by which excellence in healthcare is measured.

location.title: Where To Find Us
location.description: Looking for your new go-to medical clinic in Brighton and Bayside? Newbay Medical is based in the Brighton area.

footer.acknowledgement: We are committed to providing high-quality medical care in a safe and supportive environment for all our patients.

booking.title: Book Your Medical Appointment with Us
booking.description: We are here to serve you and provide the healthcare you deserve, whether you need a routine consultation or urgent care. Our qualified medical team is ready to welcome you. Call us today to schedule your visit or use our online booking system.

infection.title: Fast and Easy Booking
infection.desc: We value your time. Our booking system is designed to be quick and efficient. You can choose the doctor and time that best suits your personal schedule with just a few clicks.

mask.title: Personalized Care for You
mask.desc: When booking, we listen to your concerns to direct you to the most suitable doctor for your condition. Our goal is to provide a comfortable and transparent medical experience from the moment you reach out.

symptoms.title: Tips Before Booking:

list.cough: Prepare a brief summary of your medical history
list.sinus: Clearly identify the symptoms you are experiencing
list.throat: Mention any medications you are currently taking
list.fever: Ask about any specific preparation required for the exam

symptoms.note: If you have an urgent medical condition, please inform our staff when booking to receive priority.
